title: BL Inventory Peek
description: This mod adds a small preview of your inventory next to your hotbar, it even highlights the same item in your inventory that is in your hands
body:
# 📦 InventoryPeek

A lightweight client-side HUD mod for Minecraft that lets you see your inventory at all times without opening the inventory screen.

InventoryPeek displays your full main inventory directly on the HUD in a compact bottom-right layout, allowing faster item management during gameplay while keeping your screen clean and unobtrusive.

Whether you're building, fighting, speedrunning, bridging, exploring, or looting, InventoryPeek helps reduce unnecessary inventory interruptions and keeps important items visible at a glance.

---

# ✨ Features

🧰 **Full Main Inventory HUD**
Displays all 27 main inventory slots directly on your screen in real time.

🎯 **Smart Item Highlighting**
Items matching your currently selected hotbar item are automatically highlighted for quick identification.

📍 **Minimal Bottom-Right Design**
Carefully positioned to stay out of the way while remaining easy to read during gameplay.

🔢 **Stack Counts & Overlays**
Supports vanilla-style item overlays including stack sizes and durability bars.

⚡ **Lightweight & Client-Side**
No server installation required. Designed to be lightweight with minimal impact on performance.

🎮 **Vanilla-Friendly Feel**
Blends naturally into Minecraft’s existing HUD style instead of feeling intrusive or overly flashy.

---

# 🕹️ Great For

⚔️ PvP
🏗️ Building
🚀 Elytra Travel
🧱 Bridging
📦 Resource Gathering
🏃 Speedrunning
🌍 Survival Multiplayer
🔥 Fast-paced gameplay

---

# 📸 What It Does

Instead of constantly opening your inventory to search for items, InventoryPeek keeps your inventory visible at all times so you can:

* Quickly locate building blocks
* Find extra tools instantly
* Track food and rockets
* Monitor resources during combat
* Reduce inventory interruptions
* Improve overall gameplay flow

---

# 🔧 Technical Info

✅ Client-side only
✅ Fabric mod
✅ Lightweight HUD rendering
✅ Real-time inventory updates
✅ Works seamlessly during gameplay

---

# ❤️ Made For Convenience

InventoryPeek was designed to solve a simple annoyance in Minecraft gameplay: repeatedly opening the inventory just to check where something is.

The goal is to keep gameplay smooth, uninterrupted, and efficient while maintaining a clean vanilla-like experience.
